prompt:
Analyze the image and generate an open-vocabulary scene graph.
Return:
1. A short scene description.
2. Objects with normalized bounding boxes in this format: <ref>object</ref><box>[[x1, y1, x2, y2]]</box>.
3. Spatial relations in this format: <pred>predicate</pred><box>[[subject_box]]</box><box>[[object_box]]</box>.
4. Depth layers from closest to farthest.
5. Four comparative question-answer pairs about object position, depth, or size.
Use coordinates from 0 to 999. Be concise.
answer:
1. A close-up black and tan dog smiles outdoors with its tongue out, nose centered, eyes squinting, and a blurred green background behind it.

2. Objects:  
<ref>dog face</ref><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box>  
<ref>black nose</ref><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box>  
<ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box>  
<ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[243, 439, 734, 794]]</box>  
<ref>left eye</ref><box>[[218, 111, 386, 252]]</box>  
<ref>right eye</ref><box>[[682, 145, 840, 286]]</box>  
<ref>left ear</ref><box>[[39, 78, 253, 490]]</box>  
<ref>right ear</ref><box>[[790, 222, 999, 611]]</box>  
<ref>dog body</ref><box>[[657, 623, 999, 999]]</box>  
<ref>green blurred background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

3. Spatial relations:  
<pred>above</pred><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box><box>[[243, 439, 734, 794]]</box>  
<pred>protrudes from</pred><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box><box>[[243, 439, 734, 794]]</box>  
<pred>left of</pred><box>[[218, 111, 386, 252]]</box><box>[[682, 145, 840, 286]]</box>  
<pred>left of</pred><box>[[39, 78, 253, 490]]</box><box>[[790, 222, 999, 611]]</box>  
<pred>inside</pred><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box>  
<pred>inside</pred><box>[[243, 439, 734, 794]]</box><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box>  
<pred>in front of</pred><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

4. Depth layers from closest to farthest:  
Layer 1: <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box>, <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box>  
Layer 2: <ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[243, 439, 734, 794]]</box>, <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box>, <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[218, 111, 386, 252]]</box>, <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[682, 145, 840, 286]]</box>, <ref>left ear</ref><box>[[39, 78, 253, 490]]</box>, <ref>right ear</ref><box>[[790, 222, 999, 611]]</box>, <ref>dog body</ref><box>[[657, 623, 999, 999]]</box>  
Layer 3: <ref>green blurred background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

5. Comparative question-answer pairs:  
1. Question: Which is closer to the viewer, the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box> or the <ref>green blurred background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box> is closer.  
2. Question: Which is higher, the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box> or the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[236, 525, 520, 948]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box> is higher.  
3. Question: Which is farther left, the <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[218, 111, 386, 252]]</box> or the <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[682, 145, 840, 286]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[218, 111, 386, 252]]</box> is farther left.  
4. Question: Which is larger, the <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box> or the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[402, 263, 683, 523]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[58, 44, 930, 999]]</box> is larger.
